ratcheese.config.title: Rat Cheese Helper — Settings
ratcheese.hudposition.title: Rat Cheese Helper — HUD position
ratcheese.hudposition.hint1: Drag with mouse • Scroll = scale • Arrow keys = nudge
ratcheese.hudposition.hint2: Right click the box to reset position
ratcheese.hud.title: Rat's Blessing
ratcheese.smell.title: CHEESE NEARBY!
ratcheese.command.test: Test data injected — check the HUD (also try /ratcheese hud).
ratcheese.command.reset: Buffs and loot share counter reset.
ratcheese.command.scan.header: Nearby prop entities (green = detected as cheese). Click [+] to add a head texture:
ratcheese.command.scan.empty: No candidate entities found within 8 blocks.
ratcheese.achievements.title: Rat Cheese Helper — Achievements
ratcheese.achievement.loot_1.desc: Get your first loot share (RAT BLESSING)
ratcheese.achievement.incoming_1.desc: Get buffed by someone else's rat
ratcheese.achievement.mf_max.desc: Give a +7 Magic Find buff (level 100 rat)
ratcheese.achievement.smell_miss.desc: Smell cheese but fail to grab it before it despawns
ratcheese.achievement.fast_collect.desc: Grab the cheese within 1 second of smelling it
ratcheese.achievement.mined_loot.desc: Get rat loot from someone mining a block
ratcheese.achievement.total_mf_100.desc: Hand out +100 Magic Find in total
ratcheese.achievement.total_mf_500.desc: Hand out +500 Magic Find in total
ratcheese.achievement.lobby_fever.desc: Collect 10 cheeses without leaving the lobby
ratcheese.achievement.favorite.desc: Buff the same player 3 times in a row
ratcheese.achievement.night_rat.desc: Collect a cheese between 3 and 5 AM (real time)
ratcheese.achievement.conspiracy.desc: Collect a cheese while buffed by someone else's rat
ratcheese.achievement.favorite.hint: Fortune keeps picking the same ones…
ratcheese.achievement.jackpot.hint: Strike while the loot is hot!
ratcheese.achievement.night_rat.hint: Real rats don't sleep at night…
ratcheese.achievement.miss_streak.hint: Maybe see a doctor? That nose is failing…
